summary: Iteration 33: Wiki Ships, Flight Ready Filter, Avenger Variants - All 17 backend tests + 14 frontend tests passed (100%). Verified no ground vehicles in /api/ships, Avenger variants grouped correctly under Titan, flight_ready flag on all ships, all new filter dropdowns working.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings for span inside select/option - cosmetic only, functionality unaffected

passed_tests: BACKEND: No ground vehicles in /api/ships (Ballista, Nox, Dragonfly, Cyclone, Ursa all excluded)
BACKEND: Avenger Titan is base ship with variants array containing Stalker, Warlock, Renegade
BACKEND: Avenger Stalker and Avenger Warlock NOT standalone ships (properly grouped as variants)
BACKEND: Live API ships have flight_ready=true (Aurora MR, Avenger Titan, Cutlass Black, etc.)
BACKEND: Wiki ships have flight_ready=false (Endeavor, Kraken, Merchantman, Orion)
BACKEND: All 180 ships have flight_ready field
BACKEND: Ship count is 180 (no duplicates, within expected range 150-220)
BACKEND: At least 10 wiki ships present (22 added from starcitizen.tools)
BACKEND: Ground vehicles exist in /api/vehicles endpoint (Cyclone, Ursa, Nox)
FRONTEND: Ships page loads with 180 ships
FRONTEND: Flight Ready toggle has 3 buttons (All, Flight Ready, Not Flight Ready)
FRONTEND: 'Not Flight Ready' filter shows 22 ships with amber badge
FRONTEND: 'Flight Ready' filter shows 158 ships without badge
FRONTEND: Size filter dropdown has options: Snub, Small, Medium, Large, Capital
FRONTEND: Role/Type filter dropdown has 70 role options
FRONTEND: Cargo filter dropdown has options: All, Has Cargo, No Cargo
FRONTEND: Clear Filters button appears when filters active and resets all filters
FRONTEND: Avenger Titan card has variant dropdown with Stalker, Warlock, Renegade
FRONTEND: Search works - 'Carrack' shows 1 result
FRONTEND: Combined filters work - Capital + Not Flight Ready shows 8 ships
FRONTEND: Manufacturer filter works - Drake Interplanetary shows 15 ships
FRONTEND: Role filter works - Light Fighter shows 14 ships
FRONTEND: Cargo filters work - Has Cargo: 115 ships, No Cargo: 65 ships
critical_code_review_comments: Code properly excludes ground vehicles using _GROUND_VEHICLE_NAMES set and _is_ground_vehicle() function
Avenger variant mapping correctly implemented in _ROLE_VARIANT_MAP
Frontend Ships.jsx properly implements all new filters with correct data-testids
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used 22 wiki ships injected by backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 verified Wiki Ships feature. 22 non-flight-ready ships added from starcitizen.tools wiki. Ground vehicles excluded from /api/ships. Avenger Stalker/Warlock/Renegade grouped under Avenger Titan base card. Ships page has 5 filter controls: Flight Ready toggle (3 buttons), Size dropdown, Role dropdown, Cargo dropdown, Manufacturer dropdown. Clear Filters button appears when any filter is active. data-testids: flight-ready-toggle, flight-filter-all/ready/not_ready, filter-size, filter-role, filter-cargo, manufacturer-filter, clear-all-filters, search-input, ship-count, not-flight-ready-{ship_id}.
